reviews.comment:
De las pocas estaciones que aún no trabaja con la app para pagar. Deberían implementarla lo antes posible, ya que es mucho más práctico e implica no tener contacto de ningún tipo con otras personas. En épocas de covid.

(Translated by Google)
One of the few stations that doesn't yet accept payments via the app. They should implement it as soon as possible, as it's much more practical and eliminates any contact with other people. Especially during these times of COVID.

reviews.comment:
La verdad espectacular tremenda estación tiene hotel muy limpio todo los baños un lujo la verdad que excelente incluso hay estufa y cambiadores de bebé en los baños parecen de shopping

(Translated by Google)
The truth is spectacular, tremendous station, it has a very clean hotel, all the bathrooms are luxurious, really excellent, there is even a heater and baby changing tables in the bathrooms, they look like they are from a shopping mall.

reviews.comment:
Es muy linda estación con el fondo  del Rio colorado, y muy buen restaurante. no es muy ágil el despacho de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very nice station with the Colorado River in the background, and a very good restaurant. However, the fuel service isn't very efficient.

reviews.comment:
Hicimos parada de ida a villa pehuenia, no me gustó la atención de la cafetería, le pedí café y de mala manera me respondieron" no funciona la máquina", pedimos medias lunas y nos vendieron las que les habían quedado del día anterior, mi enojo es por la avivada, de vender cosas viejas sin consulta al cliente si las quieres igual, ellos( los de la estación de servicio) saben que uno está de paso y por eso el abuso.
No me amargó el viejo, pero si me dió mucha bronca..

(Translated by Google)
We stopped on the way to Villa Pehuenia. I didn't like the service at the café. I asked for coffee and they rudely replied, "The machine isn't working." We ordered croissants and they sold us the ones they had left over from the day before. My anger stems from their swindling, selling old things without asking the customer if they still wanted them. They (the gas station staff) know we're just passing through, and that's why they take advantage of us. The old man didn't ruin my day, but I was really angry.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhd012b2pRRRAB
